title: sloanea granulosa
intro: Sloanea granulosa, also known as the woolly sloanea or woolly sloan, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Sloanea granulosa include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
